packageRules.description: renovate-runner lives on gitlab.com, not this self-hosted instance; point its version lookup there. Runner-only: the upstream template ref exists solely in this runner's .gitlab-ci.yml, so the rule stays here rather than in the shared preset.

Do not digest-pin the renovate engine image. The upstream runner preset ships a customManager that extracts CI_RENOVATE_IMAGE (ghcr.io/renovatebot/renovate:<tag>) with an OPTIONAL currentDigest group; config:best-practices then raises a pinDigest update, but because the line has no digest yet the writer finds nothing to replace (foundValue=undefined) — so the renovate/pin-dependencies branch fails with 'update failure' on every run. pinDigests:false drops that pin (the engine image's only pin-dependencies upgrade), emptying the branch. Tag bumps (43.x) still flow via the renovate self-update group.
